flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Kauai Community College fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (16.6% → 12.7%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Kauai Community College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.3k → $10.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Kauai Community College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (817 → 716).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kauai Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.2% → 0.0%).
